name: Bubble Bobble
description:
Bubble Bobble is a single-screen platformer featuring two characters, Bub and Bob, who are transformed into bubble dragons. The game consists of numerous levels arranged in a series of connected chambers. The objective of each level is to defeat all the enemies present to progress to the next level. 

Bub and Bob can move horizontally and jump within the level. Their primary method of attack involves blowing bubbles that trap enemies. These bubbles float upwards for a short period. Players can then burst these bubbles, defeating the trapped enemy. Bubbles can also be jumped upon to reach higher areas. 

Enemies move around the level with varying behaviors. Some enemies chase the players directly, while others follow pre-determined paths. If a player is touched by an enemy, they lose a life. Defeated enemies may release power-ups that provide temporary advantages, such as increased speed or range. 

The game features a progressive difficulty curve, with later levels introducing new enemy types, more complex layouts, and environmental hazards. Some levels contain hidden items or secrets that can be uncovered through specific actions. If the player takes too long to complete a level, an invincible enemy will appear to hunt the player relentlessly. The game can be played in single-player or two-player cooperative mode.
